mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_user_profile (user_id, group_id, role, nickname) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupId}, #{role}, #{nickname}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_user_profile SET role = #{role} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wms_user_profile SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
